name: switch route
result: Selected app page opens without leaving editor

name: responsive preview
result: A centered fixed-size iframe is used for tablet/mobile

name: publish
steps: Review URL, visibility and security scan
result: Publication is confirmed in a dedicated dialog

name: canvas page map
result: Multiple pages are visible together on an infinite canvas

name: inspect and style an element
result: Selection remains attached to the DOM element and the preview updates without navigating away

name: targeted AI edit
result: The AI request is scoped to the selected locator and route instead of the whole project

name: inspect code safely
steps: Review sanitized markup and computed styles
result: Code context is readable without executing or exposing secrets
